title: Add --retry to test operations that tend to fail
body:
... to decrease impact of flakes.

---

We now see a network error at least once in most PRs in this repo, it’s becoming too much of a hassle.

I intend to keep expanding the scope of this PR as long as CI keeps showing new classes of avoidable failures.

comments.body: Our cirrus CI images contain a local cache registry. I would recommend to use that for PR testing at least, anything that relies on the external network just causes to much flakes. see https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/2e8c07423470e08dfc7d5c73096665781d962f51

The Skopeo tests also serve as the primary tests for the c/image/docker code, so exercising that
- without mirrors set up
- potentially, to contact some real-world registries (although we don’t test `docker.io`, despite its important position in the ecosystem)

is valuable.

I agree that _most_ tests in the repo could run against a local server, but that would require a more detailed analysis. This is just a dumb simple band-aid to immediately improve the developer experience.
GitHub branch protection requires a formal approval. Thanks!
